response: Phone let's begin by determining the number of games Samford won and lost. Phone total games played were 12. Phone ratio of wins to losses was 2 to 1. Phone total games can be divided into three parts, with two parts being wins and one part being losses. Phone each part represents 4 games, so Samford won 8 games and lost 4 games. Phone average points scored in wins were 28 per game. Phone average points scored in losses were 14 per game. Phone total points from wins would be 8 multiplied by 28. Phone total points from losses would be 4 multiplied by 14. Phone total points scored that season would be the sum of these two amounts. Phone final total points scored by Samford that season were 280.
